name: Izzy Pinzer
title: Interior Architect
homeAbout: I'm Isadora (Izzy) Pinzer, an Interior Architect, a renderer, a creative, and a dog mom. I graduated May of 2024 with a Bachelor of Fine Arts in Interior Architecture at Endicott College in Beverly, MA.

In the Fall of 2021, I had the opportunity to spend my Fall Junior year abroad in Copenhagen with DIS (Danish Institute for Study Abroad). I have been always been extremely inspired by Scandinavian design, so having the opportunity to specifically study it was priceless.

One of my favorite aspects of the design process is rendering. I truly enjoy working in Enscape or Lumion putting my ideas into a 3D space with SketchUp or Revit. I hope to learn other programs such as V-Ray, 3D Studio Max and Rhino through continued education.
